response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (13+ years) with a strong focus on developer tools, automation, and testing infrastructure, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks. However, his experience in people management is limited to informal mentoring and team leadership rather than formal management roles. His mobile platform knowledge is minimal, and he lacks direct experience in build systems or compilers. The combination of technical expertise and leadership gaps makes him a borderline candidate for this role.
strengths: Deep technical expertise in developer tools, testing frameworks, and automation (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, Trial, CI/CD setup)
Proven track record in cross-functional collaboration and mentoring (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Selenium course creation)
Strong coding skills across multiple languages (TypeScript, D, Java, Swift) with contributions to open-source projects
concerns: Limited formal people management experience (only informal mentoring and team leadership, no direct reports)
Minimal experience with mobile platforms or build systems (core focus of the role)
No direct experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
